joke.raw_joke: A woman tells her husband, "the clock fell off the wall and almost hit my mother in the head!" The husband replie - 'Shitty clock, always late!'

blocks.content:
MILO_OFFICIAL_SCRIPT_v1

seed_id: seed-031
edit_level: rewrite
script:
  setup: "My wife said the clock fell off the wall and almost hit her mother."
  punchline: "Shitty clock. Always late."
  tag: ~
changes_made: Converted third-person framing to first-person for VO delivery. Cut "in the head" — redundant after "almost hit." Kept profanity — "shitty" is doing real work here, it sells the disappointment. Clean version ("that clock") loses the edge.
caption_notes: Setup as one card. Punchline as second card — "Shitty clock." and "Always late." can be one card or split into two beats depending on Iris concept. Single card preferred.
timing_notes: Setup delivered straight, casual, like telling a friend. 0.5s pause before punchline. Punchline deadpan — the humor is in the flat disappointment, not the anger. Emphasize "always."
tts_notes: ~
quality_flag: strong
